# CWE-273 — Improper Check for Dropped Privileges (vulnerable)
lang: go
file: CWE-273-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"syscall"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// Vulnerable: ignores whether Setuid actually lowered privileges.
func DropAndServe(c *gin.Context) {
	_ = syscall.Setuid(1000)
	c.JSON(200, gin.H{"serving": true})
}
